subject: DevOps
title: Roblox's Three-Day Outage (2021)
description: A quick, practical guide to Roblox's Three-Day Outage (2021).

hook.text: October 2021. Roblox went down for 73 hours. Millions of kids couldn't play for three days.

buildup.text: A minor config change to their service mesh caused a cascade of failures across Consul.

discovery.text: Consul's KV store became overwhelmed. Service discovery broke. Nothing could find anything.

twist.text: The root cause was subtle: a hash table contention bug amplified by the config change.

climax.text: It took three days because the bug was deep in the platform layer. Hard to find, hard to fix.

punchline.text: Platform bugs cascade the hardest. Invest in platform testing.

quiz.question: What made the Roblox outage so long?
options: The bug was deep in the platform layer and hard to diagnose
They lost all their source code
